violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -No sani bucket made at cook line. Wet cloth at make table. -Ice cream sani bucket fuond at 200ppm Chlorine.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoops in candies laying with handles in products.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Did not observe date marking at any prepared items, i.e. corn dogs, pizza sticks and open potato salad.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface used with potentially hazardous food was not cleaned every four hours while in use or as frequently as required. -Blender/ice cream rings stored in water between uses and receiving full wash daily. *Ensure food contact utensils/ equipment (and holding bin) are fully washed, rinsed and sanitized every 4 hours or less.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Microwave plates stained/warped.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Dust/debris at ceiling vent/tiles. -Minimal dust at black fan.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Damp cloth and visibly dirty dry cloth at cook line cold hold table. -Kitchen sani bucket found at 25ppm chlorine solution with soap in soltuion.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Items are not being date marked- specifically noted at tartar sauce and condiments.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -The drain line from the newly installed machine drains to exterior of building.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Large gap at bottom of back door screen door with gaps at edges of door sweep of interior door.
